relationship_kinds.name: EO_ClassifiedViaObject
relationship_kinds.description: Principal's 'admintierlevel' property was classified because of a tagged object

relationship_kinds.name: EO_ScopedTo
relationship_kinds.description: Role assignment is scoped to an administrative unit or tenant

relationship_kinds.name: EO_AssignedToAdministrativeUnit
relationship_kinds.description: Principal is a member of an administrative unit

relationship_kinds.name: EO_HasWorkAccount
relationship_kinds.description: Privileged account is linked to a standard work account

relationship_kinds.name: EO_UsesPAW
relationship_kinds.description: Privileged account is assigned a device. Based on the EntraOps-specific CustomSecurityAttribute 'PrivilegedUserPawAttribute'

relationship_kinds.name: EO_PAWFor
relationship_kinds.description: Device is assigned to a privileged account. Based on the EntraOps-specific CustomSecurityAttribute 'PrivilegedUserPawAttribute'

relationship_kinds.name: EO_DeviceOwner
relationship_kinds.description: Registered device is owned by a principal

relationship_kinds.name: EO_OwnsDevice
relationship_kinds.description: Principal owns or has registered a device

relationship_kinds.name: EO_IsSponsoredBy
relationship_kinds.description: Guest or external identity is sponsored by another principal

relationship_kinds.name: EO_HasIdentityParent
relationship_kinds.description: Identity was derived from or linked to a parent identity

relationship_kinds.name: EO_IntuneRolePermission
relationship_kinds.description: Can compromise the Intune device with actions scoped to the device or tenant
